betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The True Tongue, that is what I have encountered.
After learning my name in this True Tongue, something opened up. In my being, in my soul.
I can sense more of the reality around me.
If my Ascension in Vethea was a personal journey, this is everything but.
I see reality in a different lens, and it is through this lens that I can now learn the True Names of the things and creatures around me. 
This is a strange feeling; there is sorrow, there is joy, there is insanity. It is not necessarily a pleasent state, and yet I would not trade it for anything in this world. Yes, I am thankful. 
Reality is. I am. It does not matter that I see it and myself any differently. And for this knowledge, I am thankful.
The ability to perfectly describe imperfection, because it is imperfection that leads us on our journey. That is what the True Tongue brings forth.
And with it, a new way to perceive perfection, the Hyperuranion, the Ideal.
If Definition, the incredible matter of the Arbiter, is a tangible version of what reality is, the product of the True Tongue has to do with what reality should be, what reality wants to be. Not a desire, not an idea. An objective, the objective, what reality strives towards, while never being fully able to get there. The asymptote of reality.
A destination that, while being unreachable, is inferred from the process of trying to achieve it. The all-encompassing, the Name of Names.
